series_metadata.series_description: File contains county taxing district, street address and text data relating to a physical location of a permit holder.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Maintain hard copy in the operating area until entered into the database and then destroy. ; Electronic: Maintain machine-readable records on the computer database until superseded or until record series is no longer created and then destroy by erasure., Paper: Recycle ; Electronic: Erase
